title: abutilon burandtii
intro: Abutilon burandtii, also known as the orange flowered abutilon, is a flowering plant species in the family Malvaceae. It is known for its vibrant orange flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Abutilon burandtii are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall health and well-being.
